description: You are investigating a security incident where encryption key fragments were hidden across five Docker containers: keyvault-storage, keyvault-cache, keyvault-proxy, keyvault-worker, and keyvault-scheduler. Find the 8-character hex fragment hidden in each container using various mechanisms such as labels, environment variables, logs, internal files, or mounted volumes. Assemble the complete key in the format 'FRAG1-FRAG2-FRAG3-FRAG4-FRAG5', ordering the fragments alphabetically by their container name (cache-proxy-scheduler-storage-worker). Save the single-line assembled key to ~/Desktop/recovered_key.txt and write a brief methodology report explaining how you found each piece to ~/Desktop/recovery_report.txt. Login: user ga, password password123.
